sect1.title: Introduction
sect1.para: The BSM4Tops class, implemented in Cython, is a specialized event template within the AnalysisG framework, designed to handle data specific to Beyond Standard Model (BSM) 4-top quark production events. It inherits from the generic EventTemplate class, extending its functionalities to incorporate features and structures relevant to this particular physics signature. This class provides a high-performance interface to an underlying C++ event object tailored for BSM 4-top analysis.

sect1.title: The BSM4Tops Class
sect1.para: BSM4Tops is a cdef class, indicating its implementation as a Cython extension type. It inherits from EventTemplate, thereby gaining all the base functionalities for event indexing, weighting, and tree/branch management. Its primary role is to encapsulate a C++ bsm_4tops object, which likely contains specific data members and methods pertinent to BSM 4-top events.

listitem.para: __cinit__(self): The Cython "constructor" equivalent, called during object allocation. It initializes a new C++ bsm_4tops object and assigns its pointer to self.ptr. This effectively sets up the specialized C++ backend for BSM 4-top events.
__init__(self): The standard Python initializer. This method is intentionally left empty, as initialization logic is handled by __cinit__ and the underlying C++ object.

__dealloc__(self): The Cython "destructor" equivalent, called upon object deallocation. It deallocates the C++ bsm_4tops object pointed to by self.ptr, ensuring proper memory management for the specialized event data.

sect1.title: C++ Interaction
sect1.para:
The BSM4Tops class leverages Cython's capabilities for seamless C++ integration:
cdef class BSM4Tops: Declares BSM4Tops as a Cython extension type.
cdef bsm_4tops *ptr: A C++ pointer to a bsm_4tops object, managed by the Cython class. This bsm_4tops object is the specialized C++ representation of a BSM 4-top event.
from AnalysisG.events.bsm_4tops.event_bsm_4tops cimport bsm_4tops: Imports the C++ bsm_4tops class declaration from its .pxd file.
from AnalysisG.core.event_template cimport EventTemplate: Imports the base EventTemplate class, from which BSM4Tops inherits.
